class BaseNCodecInputStream(BytesIO):
    def __init__(self, in_stream, codec, do_encode):
        super().__init__(in_stream)
        self.codec = codec
        self.do_encode = do_encode

def Base32InputStream1(in_stream, do_encode): 
    return BaseNCodecInputStream(in_stream, base64.b32decode if do_encode else base64.b32encode, do_encode)

The `Base32InputStream1` function creates an instance of the `BaseNCodecInputStream` class with the appropriate codec (either base32 encode or decode) based on the value of `do_encode`.     public Base32InputStream(
            final InputStream input,
            final boolean doEncode,
            final int lineLength,
            final byte[] lineSeparator,
            final CodecPolicy decodingPolicy) {

                input,
                new Base32(

                doEncode);
    }
